name: Python Pip Packages
description: Vendored pip wheels covering data science, web, CLI, and testing. Requires Python to be installed first.

packages.name: numpy
packages.description: N-dimensional array and numerical computing library

packages.name: pandas
packages.description: Data analysis and manipulation with DataFrames

packages.name: scipy
packages.description: Scientific computing — optimization, stats, signal processing

packages.name: scikit-learn
packages.description: Machine learning — classification, regression, clustering

packages.name: matplotlib
packages.description: 2D/3D plotting and data visualization

packages.name: plotly
packages.description: Interactive charts and dashboards

packages.name: pillow
packages.description: Image processing — read, write, transform image files

packages.name: streamlit
packages.description: Rapid data app and dashboard builder

packages.name: sqlalchemy
packages.description: SQL toolkit and ORM for Python

packages.name: requests
packages.description: Human-friendly HTTP client library

packages.name: PyYAML
packages.description: YAML parsing and serialization

packages.name: pydantic
packages.description: Data validation using Python type annotations

packages.name: openpyxl
packages.description: Read/write Excel (.xlsx) files

packages.name: Jinja2
packages.description: Fast, flexible template engine for Python

packages.name: python-dotenv
packages.description: Load environment variables from .env files

packages.name: click
packages.description: Composable command-line interface toolkit

packages.name: rich
packages.description: Rich text and beautiful formatting in the terminal

packages.name: loguru
packages.description: Simplified logging with rotation, color, and structured output

packages.name: win32-setctime
packages.description: Set file creation time on Windows (loguru dependency)

packages.name: pytest
packages.description: Feature-rich testing framework for Python

packages.name: gcovr
packages.description: Generate C/C++ code coverage reports from gcov data

packages.name: certifi
packages.description: Mozilla's CA certificate bundle for verifying TLS connections

packages.name: charset-normalizer
packages.description: Character encoding detection library; requests dependency

packages.name: colorama
packages.description: Cross-platform colored terminal output for Windows and Linux

packages.name: idna
packages.description: Internationalized Domain Names in Applications (IDNA) support

packages.name: PySimpleSOAP
packages.description: Lightweight SOAP client and server library for Python

packages.name: pywin32
packages.description: Python extensions for Windows APIs (COM, shell, registry, services)

packages.name: urllib3
packages.description: Powerful HTTP client with connection pooling; requests dependency
